description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a light beige exterior, surrounded by lush landscaping including several large bushes and flowering trees. The front facade features a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a small porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and decorative railings. The house is set back from the street, with a driveway and a parked car visible in front. The side and rear views reveal a fenced backyard with additional greenery and a patio area, as well as a secondary entrance. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, and the roof is covered with shingles. The overall design is simple yet inviting, with a focus on residential comfort and curb appeal.
description: A two-story beige suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a welcoming front porch and fenced backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, porch, symmetrical windows, and a car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain side wall, secondary entrance, and dense greenery along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and additional landscaping, with the house's back windows visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway extending to the backyard, more bushes, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, decorative railings, and flanked by symmetrical windows.
